mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND product_type = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, user_id, product_id, product_type, product_name, quantity, unit_price, amount, status, timeout_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{productType}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{timeoutAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE status = -1 AND timeout_at IS NOT NULL AND timeout_at < NOW() LIMIT 100
